news.title: Pfizer cans work on next-gen conjugate in cancer patients

news.title: Kurma closes €215M Europe-focused fund to spread across 20 biotechs

news.title: Lilly reneges on remainder of Rigel deal in another blow for RIPK1 inhibitors
news.snippet: Just a few months after ripping up the central nervous system-focused portion of its RIPK1 deal with Rigel Pharmaceuticals, Eli Lilly has now thrown out the rest of the pact, too.

news.title: AcuityMD raises $80M to help bolster AI in the medtech industry

news.title: Johnson & Johnson teams up with Viz.ai on hematoma detection

news.title: McKesson swaps minority stake in surgical unit to Apollo Funds for $1.25B
news.snippet: McKesson has let go of a minority share of its medical/surgical solutions division for $1.25 billion to Apollo Funds as part of the healthcare service giant’s plan to take the unit public next year.

news.title: Novartis narrows focus for anticoagulant after failure to best Eliquis in phase 3 trial
news.snippet: A little over a year after reabsorbing its anticoagulant abelacimab, Novartis has now terminated two phase 3 trials for the antibody.

news.title: More than 60% of Americans using AI tools for medical information: survey
news.snippet: Nearly two-thirds of Americans are using artificial intelligence-based tools to seek medical information, while about one-third do not trust them.

news.title: Evonik to pump €80M into Slovakia production facility, add 50 jobs
